# Planner Fixtures

These small repositories exercise deterministic planner heuristics through the
real repo inspector.

## Fixture Matrix

| Fixture | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `mixed-typescript-app` | Mixed source, test, docs, and tracker files for implementation planning. |
| `docs-only-site` | Documentation-only scope selection with source and test files present. |

Keep fixtures intentionally small. They should prove planner scope behavior
without becoming runnable sample applications.
